title: Foundation: compose core + installer scaffold
body:
## v0.1.0 — Foundation

### Added
- Docker compose core: Postgres + Directus with admin-token bootstrap.
- `elk-os` installer scaffold with `init` / `seed` / `wire` command surface.
- RAG engine overlay (Postgres + Qdrant + Redis + RAG API) with a doctor health row.

### Notes
- Reference instance for Analog Elk's own delivery. All seed data is synthetic.

title: Schema & seed: os_* substrate + demo data
body:
## v0.2.0 — Schema & Seed

### Added
- `os_*` Directus schema: organizations, contacts, projects, sprints, tasks, releases.
- Synthetic profile seeds (`generic` and `analogelk`) so a fresh install boots browsable.

### Changed
- Portal task board prepared to bind to the `os_tasks` substrate.

### Security
- Seeds contain no real secrets, tokens, or client PII — synthetic showcase only.
